title: Stainless Steel Casserole Dish with Lid – Induction Hob Cooking Pots Set – Non Stick Dutch Oven – 20cm 2.7L, 24cm 4.3L & 28cm 7.2L (3 Pots + 3 Glass Lids) – by Nuovva
features: PREMIUM TRI-PLY STRUCTURE: The Nuovva 6pc Casserole set is designed with three layers (304 stainless steel + aluminium + 430 stainless steel) for exceptional durability and heat efficiency. The aluminium core ensures quick, even heating, while the stainless steel interior and exterior provide strength and a polished, modern look!

USEFUL 6PC SET: Includes three casserole pots (20cm 2.7L, 24cm 4.3L & 28cm 7.2L) with matching glass lids. Our set is perfect for boiling, stewing, braising, and slow cooking, making it an extensive set for any kitchen!
RIVETED HANDLES: Ergonomically designed handles are fully riveted to ensure stability and a comfortable grip, created to stay cool on the stovetop, providing safe and easy handling while cooking!

GLASS LIDS: Each casserole pot comes with a matching transparent glass lid, allowing you to observe your food while locking in heat and moisture. The stainless steel knob handles provide a secure grip and enhance durability while keeping a consistent sleek look!

INDUCTION COMPATIBLE: Appropriate for all stovetops, including induction, gas, electric, and open flame, the satin-polished finish resists stains, and the cookware set by Nuovva is dishwasher safe for effortless cleaning and long-lasting performance!

Even heat distribution The precision-engineered tri-ply base eliminates hot spots, ensuring perfectly balanced heat for accurate, reliable cooking. Naturally Non-Stick Surface The satin-polished stainless steel interior offers excellent food release and effortless cleanup—no coating required. Oven-Ready Performance Move seamlessly from hob to oven with confidence—built to handle high temperatures for all-in-one cooking convenience.
